docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,888.38 FILED BY COOPER, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
